# H3 HotA Tournament Ports

20 scaffolded templates in [`templates/h3-port/`](../../templates/h3-port/).

Auto-generated by `tools/scaffold_h3_port.py`. Each file inherits zone topology from its OE base template; names, sizes, and description keys target H3 tournament specs.

## Template Catalog

| Template | Base | H3 size | Status |
|----------|------|---------|--------|
| Nostalgia | Mini-Nostalgia | 208 | scaffold — XL+U scale-up of Mini-Nostalgia; H3 richness 53/244/292 |
| Boomerang | Mini-Nostalgia | 144 | scaffold — L+U; many zones + rich central treasures (H3 preset 55/242) |
| Apocalypse | Diamond | 144 | scaffold — L+U underground starts; sand surface zones |
| Black'n'Blue | Jebus Cross Classic | 144 | scaffold — L+U; Necropolis pairing rules in lobby |
| 2sm4d(3) | Diamond | 144 | scaffold — L+U legacy template; roadless treasure links |
| Firewalk | Jebus Cross | 208 | scaffold — XL+U dynamic; custom object rules per h3hota |
| Clash of Dragons | Anarchy | 208 | scaffold — XL+U diplomacy/dragon utopia focus |
| 6lm10a | Spider | 208 | scaffold — XL+U branched; 5 road layout variants in H3 |
| 8mm6a | Crossroads | 208 | scaffold — XL+U contact template; central treasure clash |
| 8xm12a | Expanse | 208 | scaffold — XL+U exploration; rich central zone |
| h3dm1 | Symmetry | 144 | scaffold — Mirror L-U; start > secondary > treasure chain |
| mt_Jebus | Jebus Cross Classic | 160 | scaffold — Mirror L-U Jebus Cross variant |
| mt_Diamond | Fair'n Square | 144 | scaffold — Mirror L-U Diamond variant |
| mt_TeamJebus | OctoJebus | 160 | scaffold — Mirror 2v2 Jebus; ally zones not directly linked |
| mt_Andromeda | Universe | 208 | scaffold — Mirror XL-U contactless exploration |
| mt_Antares | Spider | 144 | scaffold — Mirror L-U early contact |
| mt_Firewalk | Firewalk | 160 | scaffold — Mirror Firewalk; depends on Firewalk scaffold |
| 2sm2c(2) | Blitz | 96 | scaffold — M-U 200% template |
| Skirmish(M) | Blitz | 96 | scaffold — M-U 200% skirmish |
| Nine-day Wonder | Sprint | 96 | scaffold — M-U 200%; custom object value settings in H3 |

## Regenerate

```bash
python tools/scaffold_h3_port.py
```

## Joins

- OE base templates listed in [official](official.md).
- Full H3→OE cross-reference in [H3 matrix](../h3/matrix.md).
- `mt_Antares` is also the base for [Antares Maelstrom](max8.md) in the max8 collection.
